note: Hardened cache-invalidation: the explorer HTML now ships with Cache-Control / Pragma / Expires meta tags so browsers never cache the HTML, plus a meta name="explorer-html-version" tag that lets the auto-reload script detect a stale cached page on the first poll and force-reload immediately (instead of waiting for the next 60 s tick). After this commit lands, all the post-v302 dashboard cards (CIRCULATING SUPPLY berenjena, CIRCULATING MINING red, DTD LOTTERY BALANCE magenta) and the rendered cASERT ceiling label and the getProfileFromLag-based lag countdown all appear on the FIRST page render rather than appearing only after the 30-60 s auto-reload triggers.
